prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e729b7be`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e729b7be` as a half-turn completion task: the output is the input plus its `rot180` copy painted only onto background, which reproduces the left-side figure on the right around the central `8`. The summary hint was used, not discarded; it matched the official examples. No new DSL primitive was needed.

The generator builds the task family explicitly instead of calling the verifier: it creates the odd square grid with the central `4` column and `8` markers, then paints a right-aligned staircase mask on the left using nested colored submasks and occasional small notches so the samples stay close to the official distribution. Official verification passed `4/4`, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked `[preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e729b7be/previews/preview_01.png)`.
